title: 10Inch Stainless Steel Spatula Baking Icing Knife Griddle Scraper for Cooking Cake Decorating
features: 【Advanced Materials】They are made of high-grade stainless steel, which is smooth and delicate.
【Handle Design Principe】The handle of each knife model is ergonomically designed to make your use more comfortable and enjoyable.

【Easy To Use】This stainless steel cake spatula is easy to clean and can be easily cleaned with water; The handle has a round hole at the end for hanging storage without taking up space; No sharp edges, so you don't have to worry about hurting your hands during use.

【Multi-application】Use on a variety of foods: frosted pastries, butter, icing, vanilla cream, cookies, pizza, sandwich crepes, pies, cupcakes, etc.; Suitable for everyone, including the elderly and children; Act as a practical gift for those around you who like eating dessert.

【3 Shopping Options】We offer 3 types of straight palette knives with the blade length of 25.40cm/10 inch, 20.32cm/8 inch or 15.24cm/6 inch. They come in different total lengths, and hopefully they can meet your needs. For their specific size information, please see the picture.
